title: centaurea soskae
intro: Centaurea soskae, also known as the Soska's knapweed or Soska's centaury, is a perennial plant in the family Asteraceae, native to the mountainous regions of the Balkans. The plant has been traditionally used for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antiseptic effects, making it useful in treating wounds, fever, and skin conditions. The health benefits of Centaurea soskae include its ability to reduce inflammation, improve digestion, and boost the immune system. Centaurea soskae can be used in various herbal preparations, such as teas, infusions, and tinctures, which can be made by steeping the flowers and leaves in hot water or a solvent like ethanol or glycerin.
